title: Osamake: Romcom Where The Childhood Friend Won't Lose
sourceNotes: Single 12-episode season (Doga Kobo, 2021), adapted from the light novel (13 volumes, complete 2025); the anime covers light novel volumes 1-4 at roughly 3 episodes per volume. The separate main manga (complete, 51 chapters / 8 volumes, ~2 manga volumes per light-novel volume) covers that same story span rather than continuing past it, so its full run is mapped across the season. Per-episode LN volume checkpoints are documented (ep. 1 opens vol. 1, ep. 9 closes vol. 3, ep. 12 closes vol. 4); manga chapter boundaries within each LN volume are proportional approximations.
